backend/main.mo: Defines data models for posts, job posts, messages, coach profiles, and sorting logic, initializes storage maps, and includes authorization and blob-storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Lists feature evidence records linking features to affected files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries of multiple frontend files describing their purpose and key behaviors.
frontend/index.css: Sets global Tailwind base styles and OKLCH theme variables for light and dark mode.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry file mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/PARITY_CHECKLIST.md: Documentation checklist verifying visual, theme, layout, and branding parity with the live XOROOTS site.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component handling authentication state, profile setup modal flow, layout rendering, and the authenticated scrolling background.
frontend/src/components/AdminBadge.tsx: Renders a red destructive-style badge marking a user as an admin.
frontend/src/components/AdminBanner.tsx: Shows a dismissible admin-only alert banner for new notifications, polling every 30 seconds.
frontend/src/components/AuthenticatedScr: Wrapper component that displays the authenticated-only scrolling logo watermark background.
frontend/src/components/BrandLogo.tsx: Renders the XOROOTS logo with size variants and fallback text if the image fails to load.
frontend/src/components/CoachDirectory.t: Displays searchable list of coach profiles with follow, unfollow, and delete actions and admin-aware controls.
frontend/src/components/CoachProfileDeta: Shows detailed coach profile in a modal with tabs, follow/unfollow, post/job deletion, and account removal options.
frontend/src/components/EditPostModal.ts: Modal for editing a post’s text and attachments, allowing adding, removing, and saving updated content.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders footer with current year and link attribution to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Top navigation bar with theme toggle, user avatar menu, and logout, showing admin badge when applicable.
frontend/src/components/JobBoard.tsx: Displays job listings with posting, applying, viewing details, and admin or poster deletion controls.
frontend/src/components/MessagingHub.tsx: Messaging UI showing connections, message threads, and sending direct messages.
frontend/src/components/MyProfile.tsx: User profile editor allowing viewing, updating details, photo upload, and role/position selection.
frontend/src/components/PostAttachmentRe: Renders post attachments with image, video, and PDF handling plus fallback and download support.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal for initial profile creation with fields, photo upload, and role/position selection.
frontend/src/components/SocialFeed.tsx: Main feed with posts, likes, comments, attachments, sorting, and profile interactions.
frontend/src/constants/branding.ts: Defines global branding constants like logo path and app name.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages authenticated or anonymous backend actors and invalidates dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for managing Internet Identity authentication, including login state and persisted identities.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, photos, and related backend data using the actor and identity context.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS base setup with custom theme variables, dark mode styles, and a scrolling background logo animation.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes the React app, wrapping it with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Renders the authenticated dashboard with tab navigation for feed, coaches, jobs, messages, and profile.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Displays the public landing page with feature highlights and triggers Internet Identity login.
frontend/src/utils/attachmentTypes.ts: Utility functions to detect whether a file is an image, video, or PDF based on MIME type and extension.
frontend/src/utils/blobMime.ts: Maps file extensions to MIME types and validates or infers MIME types for attachments.
frontend/src/utils/downloadAttachment.ts: Downloads an attachment by fetching its bytes, creating a Blob with the correct MIME type, and triggering a browser download.
frontend/src/utils/imageBlobUrl.ts: Provides a utility to create image URLs from ExternalBlob with fallback to Blob URLs and a React hook to manage URL loading and cleanup.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters, persisting them in sessionStorage, and manipulating hash-based parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending theme colors, layout, animations, and plugin setup for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing branding work, known issues, and feature requests for a clean baseline app and logo-related UI updates.
